name: American Financial Solutions
description_short: American Financial Solutions is a credit repair provider based in Bremerton, Washington. Rated 4.8/5 with 27 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
American Financial Solutions is a credit repair provider serving clients in Bremerton, Washington. Carrying a 4.8/5.0 Google rating from 27 reviews, American Financial Solutions has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Bremerton area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a foreclosure service, American Financial Solutions provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Bremerton, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. American Financial Solutions operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Bremerton, Washington area who are considering American Financial Solutions should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
